name: HSBC Live+ Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC Live+ Credit Card cashback terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends above Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: Rs 1,000 cashback after logging into HSBC India app and spending Rs 20,000 within first 30 days
Voucher worth up to Rs 500 for Amazon Pay, Zomato and Swiggy on activation with a single transaction of Rs 300 or more
10% cashback on dining, food delivery and grocery spends, capped at Rs 1,000 per month
1.5% unlimited cashback on most other eligible spends
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, one per quarter
Free 12-month Times Prime subscription, subject to Visa Signature terms
Complimentary flight seat selections twice a year on domestic flights booked with MakeMyTrip
District by Zomato dining and movie offers, subject to terms

salaried: Age 18 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 6 lakh per year and eligible city residence
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 12 lakh per year and eligible city residence

name: HSBC TravelOne Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spends above Rs 12 lakh
joiningBenefits: Rs 1,000 cashback, Rs 3,000 PostCard voucher and 3 months EazyDiner Prime membership after logging into HSBC mobile app and spending Rs 10,000 within 30 days
3,000 bonus reward points on spending Rs 1 lakh in first 90 days
additionalBenefits: 4 complimentary chauffeur-driven airport transfers per year, max 1 per quarter
15% off flights and hotels with selected travel partners
Buy 1 Get 1 free on movie tickets twice a month, capped at Rs 250 per ticket
10% off dining bills up to Rs 1,000 with EazyDiner and Zomato, up to 12 times a year and max Rs 5,000 per reservation
15% off up to Rs 5,000 on flights and hotel bookings with Yatra, EaseMyTrip, Paytm Flights and Cleartrip, subject to partner terms

Best Price Guarantee on Travel with Points bookings: if you find a lower rate within 24 hours, HSBC refunds the difference as travel credits up to Rs 1,500 in the Travel with Points wallet for a future booking
Access to Mastercard World benefits including golf, travel and lifestyle offers
Up to USD 20,000 purchase protection per year
additionalDetails: Accelerated 4 reward points per Rs 100 on airlines, travel aggregators and foreign currency spends excluding DCC are capped at 50,000 reward points per calendar month, then revert to the regular 2 reward points per Rs 100

Travel with Points portal bookings earn up to 4X on flights, up to 6X on hotels and 2X on car rentals for TravelOne, which works out to up to 16, 24 and 8 reward points per Rs 100 respectively based on the card's travel earn rate
Travel with Points 6X and 12X accelerated reward points on flights and hotels are earned up to 18,000 points per month on card payments, after which earn reverts to the regular TravelOne travel rate
Travel with Points bookings are priced in INR, so HSBC says no foreign exchange fees are charged on those portal bookings through June 2026
Reward points on add-on cards are eligible and the monthly accelerated cap is calculated cumulatively across primary and add-on cards
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-27
For foreign-currency airline or travel-aggregator spends, HSBC says only 1 bonus reward point is awarded, not stacked airline/travel and foreign-currency bonus points together
Base reward points accrue at 1 reward point for every Rs 50 of qualifying spend, with any non-multiple carry-forward added to the next settled transaction
Accelerated bonus reward points also use Rs 50 blocks and transaction-level carry-forward for eligible airline, travel-aggregator and foreign-currency spends
HSBC notes that Travel with Points accelerated rewards already include the base reward points for the card type
Most airline transfers complete instantly or within 1 working day after redemption in the HSBC India Mobile Banking app

HSBC states longer airline transfer timelines of up to 5 working days for Hainan Airlines Fortune Wings Club and Air India Maharaja Club, up to 10 working days for JAL Mileage Bank, and up to 3 working days for InterMiles
Most hotel transfers complete instantly or within 1 working day after redemption
HSBC says transfer partner lists and ratios may be updated from time to time
Accelerated categories explicitly listed by HSBC include airline MCCs and travel aggregator MCCs
Applicants must reside in an eligible service city listed by HSBC
HSBC value chart illustrates point value at Rs 1 per point when converted across select airline and hotel partners
HSBC value chart shows perceived value assumptions such as Rs 4 lakh yearly spend in foreign currency or travel category and capped partner-use assumptions for lifestyle and travel offers

salaried: Age 18 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 6 lakh per year and eligible city residence
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 12 lakh per year and eligible city residence
